title: Java Full Stack Developer Trainee
description: Completed intensive industry-oriented training in Java Full Stack Development. Built enterprise-grade web applications using Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, React.js, MySQL, and REST APIs while following modern software engineering practices.

title: Core Java Intern
description: Completed a Core Java internship focused on object-oriented programming, collections, exception handling, multithreading, file handling, and console-based application development through practical coding tasks.

title: Software Development Intern
description: Worked on enterprise software development tasks, collaborated within Agile teams, implemented frontend and backend features, integrated REST APIs, and improved application performance using modern development practices.

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description: Learning Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, and Machine Learning fundamentals through industry-aligned projects, practical assignments, and AI-powered application development.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Developed production-ready software solutions that solve real-world problems. Built scalable full-stack applications including BLACKSWAP (AI-powered Student Marketplace), MarketMind (AI Trading Platform), Campus Interview Tracker, Student Expense Calculator, and Airbnb Clone using Java Full Stack and MERN technologies.
